DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Irving L. Berg, Esq. The Berg Law Group (415) 924-0742 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Marcos Sasso, Esq. of Stroock & Stroock & Lavan LLP, (310) 556-5800, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is overruled. Ten days leave to answer. (Moving party to prepare Order.) (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
